TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Dave_Bing, title = Dave_Bing, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dave_Bing} }

S.FORM: Dave Bing nalecuhan i Washington, D.C., U.S., nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Dave Bing i 1966 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 2, namapili' tu nu Detroit Pistons putiput. 11 bulad 24 demiad, 1943 a mihca, Dave Bing, miunduay.
S.PHON: da*ə biŋ nar~ɾəʦuħan i wasħiŋton, d.ʦ., u.s., nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. da*ə biŋ i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ *, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu dətroit pistons putiput. ** bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, da*ə biŋ, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Dave Bing nalecuhan i Washington, D.C., U.S., nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Dave Bing i 1966 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 2, namapili' tu nu Detroit Pistons putiput. 11 bulad 24 demiad, 1943 a mihca, Dave Bing, miunduay.
S.PHON: da*ə biŋ nar~ɾəʦuħan i wasħiŋton, d.ʦ., u.s., nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. da*ə biŋ i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ *, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu dətroit pistons putiput. ** bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, da*ə biŋ, miunduaj.
